revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:May 24 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of May 24 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦5月24日'''は[[旧暦]][[5月 (旧暦)|5月]]の24日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[文武天皇]]3年（[[699年]]_月_日） - 修験道の開祖・[[役行者]]（役小角）が弟子の讒言により[[伊豆]]に流罪 * [[文治]]元年（[[1185年]]_月_日） - [[源頼朝]]の不興を解く為に鎌倉へ向かった[[源義経|義経]]が、腰越で留められたため書状を大江広元に託す（腰越状） * [[寛政]]2年（[[1790年]]_月_日） - [[寛政異学の禁]]。[[松平定信]]が、[[朱子学]]以外の学問を異学として[[湯島聖堂]]での教授を禁止
== 誕生日 == * [[天暦]]4年（[[950年]]_月_日） - [[冷泉天皇]]、63代[[天皇]]（+ [[1011年]]） * [[元永]]元年（[[1118年]]_月_日） - [[千葉常胤]]、[[武将]]・下総守護（+ [[1201年]]） * [[正保]]元年（[[1644年]]_月_日） - [[徳川綱重]]、初代[[甲府藩]]主(初代)・[[徳川家光]]の三男・[[徳川家宣]]の父（+ [[1678年]]） * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（[[1846年]][[7月17日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]、[[江戸幕府]]14代将軍（+ [[1866年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]13年（[[1636年]][[6月27日]]） - [[伊達政宗]]、[[武将]]・初代[[仙台藩]]主（* [[1567年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[5月23日 (旧暦)|5月23日]] 翌日[[5月25日 (旧暦)|5月25日]] - 前月[[4月24日 (旧暦)|4月24日]] 翌月[[6月24日 (旧暦)|6月24日]] *新暦[[5月24日]]
{{msg:stub}}

'''旧暦5月24日'''は[[旧暦]][[5月 (旧暦)|5月]]の24日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。

== 誕生日 == * [[天暦]]4年（[[950年]]_月_日） - [[冷泉天皇]]、63代[[天皇]]（+ [[1011年]]） * [[元永]]元年（[[1118年]]_月_日） - [[千葉常胤]]、[[武将]]・下総守護（+ [[1201年]]） * [[正保]]元年（[[1644年]]_月_日） - [[徳川綱重]]、初代[[甲府藩]]主(初代)・[[徳川家光]]の三男・[[徳川家宣]]の父（+ [[1678年]]） * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（[[1846年]][[7月17日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]、[[江戸幕府]]14代将軍（+ [[1866年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]13年（[[1636年]][[6月27日]]） - [[伊達政宗]]、[[武将]]・初代[[仙台藩]]主（* [[1567年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[5月23日 (旧暦)|5月23日]] 翌日[[5月25日 (旧暦)|5月25日]] - 前月[[4月24日 (旧暦)|4月24日]] 翌月[[6月24日 (旧暦)|6月24日]] *新暦[[5月24日]]
{{stub}}

{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月24日'''は[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の24日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[文武天皇]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[699年]][[6月26日]]） - 修験道の開祖・[[役行者]]（役小角）が弟子の讒言により[[伊豆国|伊豆]]に流罪 * [[文治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1185年]][[6月23日]]） - [[源頼朝]]の不興を解く為に鎌倉へ向かった[[源義経|義経]]が、[[腰越]]で留められたため書状を大江広元に託す（腰越状） * [[寛政]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1790年]][[7月6日]]） - [[寛政異学の禁]]。[[松平定信]]が、[[朱子学]]以外の学問を異学として[[湯島聖堂]]での教授を禁止
== 誕生日 == * [[天暦]]4年（ユリウス暦[[950年]][[6月12日]]） - [[冷泉天皇]]、63代[[天皇]]（+ [[1011年]]） * [[元永]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1118年]][[6月14日]]） - [[千葉常胤]]、[[武将]]・[[下総国|下総]]守護（+ [[1201年]]） * [[正保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1644年]][[6月28日]]） - [[徳川綱重]]、初代[[甲府藩]]主(初代)・[[徳川家光]]の三男・[[徳川家宣]]の父（+ [[1678年]]） * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[7月17日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]、[[江戸幕府]]14代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1866年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1636年]][[6月27日]]） - [[伊達政宗]]、[[武将]]・初代[[仙台藩]]主（* [[1567年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|23|5|25|4|24|6|5|0524}}

== できごと == * [[文武天皇]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[699年]][[6月26日]]） - 修験道の開祖・[[役行者]]（役小角）が弟子の讒言により[[伊豆国|伊豆]]に流罪 * [[文治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1185年]][[6月23日]]） - [[源頼朝]]の不興を解く為に鎌倉へ向かった[[源義経|義経]]が、[[腰越]]で留められたため書状（[[腰越状]]）を大江広元に託す * [[天正]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1576年]][[6月20日]]） - [[前田利家]]が、[[越前一向一揆]]の捕虜千人ほどを処刑。[[磔]]・[[釜茹で]]にした。（一向一揆文字瓦、年代は推定。天正8年、ユリウス暦[[1580年]][[7月5日]]説もある） * [[寛政]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1790年]][[7月6日]]） - [[寛政異学の禁]]。[[松平定信]]が、[[朱子学]]以外の学問を異学として[[湯島聖堂]]での教授を禁止
== 誕生日 == * [[天暦]]4年（ユリウス暦[[950年]][[6月12日]]） - [[冷泉天皇]]、63代[[天皇]]（+ [[1011年]]） * [[元永]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1118年]][[6月14日]]） - [[千葉常胤]]、[[武将]]・[[下総国|下総]]守護（+ [[1201年]]） * [[正保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1644年]][[6月28日]]） - [[徳川綱重]]、初代[[甲府藩]]主・[[徳川家光]]の三男・[[徳川家宣]]の父（+ [[1678年]]） * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[7月17日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]、[[江戸幕府]]14代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1866年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[7月11日]]） - [[喜田貞吉]]、[[歴史家|歴史学者]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1636年]][[6月27日]]） - [[伊達政宗]]、[[武将]]・初代[[仙台藩]]主（* [[1567年]]）

== できごと == * [[文武天皇]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[699年]][[6月26日]]） - 修験道の開祖・[[役行者]]（役小角）が弟子の讒言により[[伊豆国|伊豆]]に流罪 * [[文治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1185年]][[6月23日]]） - [[源頼朝]]の不興を解く為に鎌倉へ向かった[[源義経|義経]]が、[[腰越]]で留められたため書状（[[腰越状]]）を大江広元に託す * [[天正]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1576年]][[6月20日]]） - [[前田利家]]が、[[越前一向一揆]]の捕虜千人ほどを処刑。[[磔]]・[[釜茹で]]にした。（一向一揆文字瓦、年代は推定。天正8年、ユリウス暦[[1580年]][[7月5日]]説もある） * [[寛政]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1790年]][[7月6日]]） - [[寛政異学の禁]]。[[松平定信]]が、[[朱子学]]以外の学問を異学として[[湯島聖堂]]での教授を禁止
== 誕生日 == * [[天暦]]4年（ユリウス暦[[950年]][[6月12日]]） - [[冷泉天皇]]、63代[[天皇]]（+ [[1011年]]） * [[元永]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1118年]][[6月14日]]） - [[千葉常胤]]、[[武将]]・[[下総国|下総]]守護（+ [[1201年]]） * [[正保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1644年]][[6月28日]]） - [[徳川綱重]]、初代[[甲府藩]]主・[[徳川家光]]の三男・[[徳川家宣]]の父（+ [[1678年]]） * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[7月17日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]、[[江戸幕府]]14代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1866年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[7月11日]]） - [[喜田貞吉]]、[[歴史家|歴史学者]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1636年]][[6月27日]]） - [[伊達政宗]]、[[武将]]・初代[[仙台藩]]主（* [[1567年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|23|5|25|4|24|6|5|0524}}

== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1636年]][[6月27日]]） - [[伊達政宗]]、[[武将]]・初代[[仙台藩]]主（* [[1567年]]）

{{Lunar May}} '''Lunar May24日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の24日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[文武天皇]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[699年]][[6月26日]]） - 修験道の開祖・[[役行者]]（役小角）が弟子の讒言により[[伊豆国|伊豆]]に流罪 * [[文治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1185年]][[6月23日]]） - [[源頼朝]]の不興を解く為に鎌倉へ向かった[[源義経|義経]]が、[[腰越]]で留められたため書状（[[腰越状]]）を大江広元に託す * [[天正]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1576年]][[6月20日]]） - [[前田利家]]が、[[越前一向一揆]]の捕虜千人ほどを処刑。[[磔]]・[[釜茹で]]にした。（一向一揆文字瓦、年代は推定。天正8年、ユリウス暦[[1580年]][[7月5日]]説もある） * [[寛政]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1790年]][[7月6日]]） - [[寛政異学の禁]]。[[松平定信]]が、[[朱子学]]以外の学問を異学として[[湯島聖堂]]での教授を禁止
== 誕生日 == * [[天暦]]4年（ユリウス暦[[950年]][[6月12日]]） - [[冷泉天皇]]、63代[[天皇]]（+ [[1011年]]） * [[元永]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1118年]][[6月14日]]） - [[千葉常胤]]、[[武将]]・[[下総国|下総]]守護（+ [[1201年]]） * [[正保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1644年]][[6月28日]]） - [[徳川綱重]]、初代[[甲府藩]]主・[[徳川家光]]の三男・[[徳川家宣]]の父（+ [[1678年]]） * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[7月17日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]、[[江戸幕府]]14代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1866年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[7月11日]]） - [[喜田貞吉]]、[[歴史家|歴史学者]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1636年]][[6月27日]]） - [[伊達政宗]]、[[武将]]・初代[[仙台藩]]主（* [[1567年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|23|5|25|4|24|6|5|0524}}
[[Category:japanese Lunar Calendar]][[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunar May]][[sn:May 24日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}}

revision.comment: idk what haoppened but removing and re-adding the template
Text replacement - "日'''は" to "--> is the Nth day of "
Moving from [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] to [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding boilerplate intro to all the days
Text replacement - "旧暦}}" to "旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}"

revision.text:
'''May 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar May}} ''May 24'''<!--Lunar May24--> is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の24日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[文武天皇]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[699年]][[6月26日]]） - 修験道の開祖・[[役行者]]（役小角）が弟子の讒言により[[伊豆国|伊豆]]に流罪 * [[文治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1185年]][[6月23日]]） - [[源頼朝]]の不興を解く為に鎌倉へ向かった[[源義経|義経]]が、[[腰越]]で留められたため書状（[[腰越状]]）を大江広元に託す * [[天正]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1576年]][[6月20日]]） - [[前田利家]]が、[[越前一向一揆]]の捕虜千人ほどを処刑。[[磔]]・[[釜茹で]]にした。（一向一揆文字瓦、年代は推定。天正8年、ユリウス暦[[1580年]][[7月5日]]説もある） * [[寛政]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1790年]][[7月6日]]） - [[寛政異学の禁]]。[[松平定信]]が、[[朱子学]]以外の学問を異学として[[湯島聖堂]]での教授を禁止
== 誕生日 == * [[天暦]]4年（ユリウス暦[[950年]][[6月12日]]） - [[冷泉天皇]]、63代[[天皇]]（+ [[1011年]]） * [[元永]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1118年]][[6月14日]]） - [[千葉常胤]]、[[武将]]・[[下総国|下総]]守護（+ [[1201年]]） * [[正保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1644年]][[6月28日]]） - [[徳川綱重]]、初代[[甲府藩]]主・[[徳川家光]]の三男・[[徳川家宣]]の父（+ [[1678年]]） * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[7月17日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]、[[江戸幕府]]14代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1866年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[7月11日]]） - [[喜田貞吉]]、[[歴史家|歴史学者]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1636年]][[6月27日]]） - [[伊達政宗]]、[[武将]]・初代[[仙台藩]]主（* [[1567年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|23|5|25|4|24|6|5|0524}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar May]][[sn:May 24日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:仏滅]]

== Births == * [[天暦]]4年（ユリウス暦[[950年]][[6月12日]]） - [[冷泉天皇]]、63代[[天皇]]（+ [[1011年]]） * [[元永]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1118年]][[6月14日]]） - [[千葉常胤]]、[[武将]]・[[下総国|下総]]守護（+ [[1201年]]） * [[正保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1644年]][[6月28日]]） - [[徳川綱重]]、初代[[甲府藩]]主・[[徳川家光]]の三男・[[徳川家宣]]の父（+ [[1678年]]） * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[7月17日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]、[[江戸幕府]]14代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1866年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[7月11日]]） - [[喜田貞吉]]、[[歴史家|歴史学者]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== Deaths == * [[寛永]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1636年]][[6月27日]]） - [[伊達政宗]]、[[武将]]・初代[[仙台藩]]主（* [[1567年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|23|5|25|4|24|6|5|0524}}

== Births == * [[天暦]]4年（ユリウス暦[[950年]][[6月12日]]） - [[冷泉天皇]]、63代[[天皇]]（+ [[1011年]]） * [[元永]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1118年]][[6月14日]]） - [[千葉常胤]]、[[武将]]・[[下総国|下総]]守護（+ [[1201年]]） * [[正保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1644年]][[6月28日]]） - [[徳川綱重]]、初代[[甲府藩]]主・[[徳川家光]]の三男・[[徳川家宣]]の父（+ [[1678年]]） * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[7月17日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]、[[江戸幕府]]14代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1866年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[7月11日]]） - [[喜田貞吉]]、[[歴史家|歴史学者]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== Deaths == * [[寛永]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1636年]][[6月27日]]） - [[伊達政宗]]、[[武将]]・初代[[仙台藩]]主（* [[1567年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|5|23|5|25|4|24|6|5|0524}}

{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:仏滅]] [[Category:Days 24 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:May 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:qq]]

{{Lunar May}} {{Lunar May}} '''May 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.

Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar360日" to "Lunar Calendar See Also"
Text replacement - " (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the" to "''' is the"
I think this is the glitch source
attempting again to remove the lunar calendar days comments that are causing problems
removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it
doing a mass replace to get the proper intweriki links for all the dates
Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion

running another replacement to get rid of the category inappriproate overlap new ones added

Removing from [[Category:New pages most likely u]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding korean to all the dates
removing some junk and restandardizing the references section and template
revision.text:
[[sn:May 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] [[zh:五月廿四]] [[en:draft:May 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|699 AD|ja|699年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}}) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角}}, was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1185 AD|ja|1185年}} {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}}) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}}, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshitsune|lt_ja=義経}}, who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|ja|腰越}}, and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Koshigoe Letter|ja|腰越状}}) to {{ill|Ōe Hiromoto|ja|大江広元}}. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1576 AD|ja|1576年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆}}, subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}})). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790年}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日}}) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Reisō|ja|冷泉天皇}}, the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (d. {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}}). * {{ill|Gennin|ja|元永}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1118 AD|ja|1118年}} {{ill|June 14|ja|6月14日}}) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}}, a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|ja|下総国|lt=Shimōsa}} (d. {{ill|1201 AD|ja|1201年}}). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1644 AD|ja|1644年}} {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}}, the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}}, the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}}, and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (d. {{ill|1678 AD|ja|1678年}}). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846 AD|ja|1846年}} {{ill|July 17|ja|7月17日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemoto|ja|徳川家茂}}, the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} (d. {{ill|1866 AD|ja|1866年}}). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871 AD|ja|1871年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}}) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉}}, a historian (d. {{ill|1939 AD|ja|1939年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636年}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}}) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗}}, a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567年}}).
== Commemorations == *
[[Category:New Pages]][[ja:年表]]

[[sn:May 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] [[zh:五月廿四]] [[en:draft:May 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|699 AD|ja|699年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}}) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角}}, was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1185 AD|ja|1185年}} {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}}) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}}, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshitsune|lt_ja=義経}}, who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|ja|腰越}}, and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Koshigoe Letter|ja|腰越状}}) to {{ill|Ōe Hiromoto|ja|大江広元}}. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1576 AD|ja|1576年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆}}, subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}})). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790年}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日}}) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Reisō|ja|冷泉天皇}}, the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (d. {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}}). * {{ill|Gennin|ja|元永}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1118 AD|ja|1118年}} {{ill|June 14|ja|6月14日}}) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}}, a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|ja|下総国|lt=Shimōsa}} (d. {{ill|1201 AD|ja|1201年}}). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1644 AD|ja|1644年}} {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}}, the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}}, the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}}, and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (d. {{ill|1678 AD|ja|1678年}}). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846 AD|ja|1846年}} {{ill|July 17|ja|7月17日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemoto|ja|徳川家茂}}, the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} (d. {{ill|1866 AD|ja|1866年}}). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871 AD|ja|1871年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}}) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉}}, a historian (d. {{ill|1939 AD|ja|1939年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636年}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}}) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗}}, a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567年}}).
== Commemorations == *
[[Category:New Pages]][[ja:年表]]

[[sn:May 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] [[zh:五月廿四]] [[en:draft:May 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|699 AD|ja|699年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}}) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角}}, was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1185 AD|ja|1185年}} {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}}) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}}, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshitsune|lt_ja=義経}}, who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|ja|腰越}}, and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Koshigoe Letter|ja|腰越状}}) to {{ill|Ōe Hiromoto|ja|大江広元}}. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1576 AD|ja|1576年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆}}, subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}})). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790年}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日}}) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Reisō|ja|冷泉天皇}}, the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (d. {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}}). * {{ill|Gennin|ja|元永}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1118 AD|ja|1118年}} {{ill|June 14|ja|6月14日}}) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}}, a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|ja|下総国|lt=Shimōsa}} (d. {{ill|1201 AD|ja|1201年}}). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1644 AD|ja|1644年}} {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}}, the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}}, the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}}, and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (d. {{ill|1678 AD|ja|1678年}}). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846 AD|ja|1846年}} {{ill|July 17|ja|7月17日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemoto|ja|徳川家茂}}, the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} (d. {{ill|1866 AD|ja|1866年}}). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871 AD|ja|1871年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}}) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉}}, a historian (d. {{ill|1939 AD|ja|1939年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636年}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}}) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗}}, a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567年}}).
== Commemorations == *
[[Category:New Pages]][[ja:年表]]

[[sn:May 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] [[zh:五月廿四]] [[en:draft:May 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]
{{Lunar May}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|699 AD|ja|699年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1185 AD|ja|1185年}} {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}} ) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshitsune|lt_ja=義経}} , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|ja|腰越}} , and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Koshigoe Letter|ja|腰越状}} ) to {{ill|Ōe Hiromoto|ja|大江広元}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1576 AD|ja|1576年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790年}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reisō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (d. {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}} ). * {{ill|Gennin|ja|元永}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1118 AD|ja|1118年}} {{ill|June 14|ja|6月14日}} ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|ja|下総国|lt=Shimōsa}} (d. {{ill|1201 AD|ja|1201年}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1644 AD|ja|1644年}} {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (d. {{ill|1678 AD|ja|1678年}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846 AD|ja|1846年}} {{ill|July 17|ja|7月17日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemoto|ja|徳川家茂}} , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} (d. {{ill|1866 AD|ja|1866年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871 AD|ja|1871年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939 AD|ja|1939年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636年}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567年}} ).
== Commemorations == *
[[Category:New Pages]] [[ja:年表]]

[[sn:May 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] [[zh:五月廿四]] [[en:draft:May 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]
{{Lunar May}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|699 AD|ja|699年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1185 AD|ja|1185年}} {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}} ) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshitsune|lt_ja=義経}} , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|ja|腰越}} , and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Koshigoe Letter|ja|腰越状}} ) to {{ill|Ōe Hiromoto|ja|大江広元}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1576 AD|ja|1576年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790年}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reisō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (d. {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}} ). * {{ill|Gennin|ja|元永}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1118 AD|ja|1118年}} {{ill|June 14|ja|6月14日}} ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|ja|下総国|lt=Shimōsa}} (d. {{ill|1201 AD|ja|1201年}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1644 AD|ja|1644年}} {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (d. {{ill|1678 AD|ja|1678年}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846 AD|ja|1846年}} {{ill|July 17|ja|7月17日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemoto|ja|徳川家茂}} , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} (d. {{ill|1866 AD|ja|1866年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871 AD|ja|1871年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939 AD|ja|1939年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636年}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567年}} ).
== Commemorations == *
[[Category:New Pages]] [[ja:年表]]
== See Also ==

(Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790年}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reisō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (d. {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}} ). * {{ill|Gennin|ja|元永}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1118 AD|ja|1118年}} {{ill|June 14|ja|6月14日}} ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|ja|下総国|lt=Shimōsa}} (d. {{ill|1201 AD|ja|1201年}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1644 AD|ja|1644年}} {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (d. {{ill|1678 AD|ja|1678年}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846 AD|ja|1846年}} {{ill|July 17|ja|7月17日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemoto|ja|徳川家茂}} , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} (d. {{ill|1866 AD|ja|1866年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871 AD|ja|1871年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939 AD|ja|1939年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636年}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567年}} ).
== Commemorations == *

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}}" to "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] [[zh:五月廿四]] [[en:draft:May 24 (Lunisolar)]]
{{Lunar May}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|699 AD|ja|699年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1185 AD|ja|1185年}} {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}} ) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshitsune|lt_ja=義経}} , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|ja|腰越}} , and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Koshigoe Letter|ja|腰越状}} ) to {{ill|Ōe Hiromoto|ja|大江広元}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1576 AD|ja|1576年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790年}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reisō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (d. {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}} ). * {{ill|Gennin|ja|元永}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1118 AD|ja|1118年}} {{ill|June 14|ja|6月14日}} ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|ja|下総国|lt=Shimōsa}} (d. {{ill|1201 AD|ja|1201年}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1644 AD|ja|1644年}} {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (d. {{ill|1678 AD|ja|1678年}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846 AD|ja|1846年}} {{ill|July 17|ja|7月17日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemoto|ja|徳川家茂}} , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} (d. {{ill|1866 AD|ja|1866年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871 AD|ja|1871年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939 AD|ja|1939年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636年}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567年}} ).
== Commemorations == *

[[sn:May 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] [[zh:五月廿四]] [[en:draft:May 24 (Lunisolar)]]
{{Lunar May}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|699 AD|ja|699年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1185 AD|ja|1185年}} {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}} ) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshitsune|lt_ja=義経}} , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|ja|腰越}} , and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Koshigoe Letter|ja|腰越状}} ) to {{ill|Ōe Hiromoto|ja|大江広元}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1576 AD|ja|1576年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790年}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reisō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (d. {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}} ). * {{ill|Gennin|ja|元永}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1118 AD|ja|1118年}} {{ill|June 14|ja|6月14日}} ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|ja|下総国|lt=Shimōsa}} (d. {{ill|1201 AD|ja|1201年}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1644 AD|ja|1644年}} {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (d. {{ill|1678 AD|ja|1678年}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846 AD|ja|1846年}} {{ill|July 17|ja|7月17日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemoto|ja|徳川家茂}} , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} (d. {{ill|1866 AD|ja|1866年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871 AD|ja|1871年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939 AD|ja|1939年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636年}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567年}} ).
== Commemorations == *

[[sn:May 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] [[zh:五月廿四]] [[en:draft:May 24 (Lunisolar)]]
{{Lunar May}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|699 AD|ja|699年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1185 AD|ja|1185年}} {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}} ) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshitsune|lt_ja=義経}} , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|ja|腰越}} , and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Koshigoe Letter|ja|腰越状}} ) to {{ill|Ōe Hiromoto|ja|大江広元}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1576 AD|ja|1576年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790年}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reisō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (d. {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}} ). * {{ill|Gennin|ja|元永}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1118 AD|ja|1118年}} {{ill|June 14|ja|6月14日}} ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|ja|下総国|lt=Shimōsa}} (d. {{ill|1201 AD|ja|1201年}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1644 AD|ja|1644年}} {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (d. {{ill|1678 AD|ja|1678年}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846 AD|ja|1846年}} {{ill|July 17|ja|7月17日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemoto|ja|徳川家茂}} , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} (d. {{ill|1866 AD|ja|1866年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871 AD|ja|1871年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939 AD|ja|1939年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636年}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567年}} ).
== Commemorations == *
[[Category:New Pages]] [[ja:年表]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|23|5|25|4|24|6|5|0524}}

(Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790年}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂}} .

== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636年}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567年}} ).
== Commemorations == *
[[Category:New Pages]] [[ja:年表]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "江戸幕府" to "Tokugawa shogunate"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] [[zh:五月廿四]] [[en:draft:May 24 (Lunisolar)]]
{{Lunar May}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|699 AD|ja|699年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1185 AD|ja|1185年}} {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}} ) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshitsune|lt_ja=義経}} , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|ja|腰越}} , and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Koshigoe Letter|ja|腰越状}} ) to {{ill|Ōe Hiromoto|ja|大江広元}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1576 AD|ja|1576年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790年}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reisō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (d. {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}} ). * {{ill|Gennin|ja|元永}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1118 AD|ja|1118年}} {{ill|June 14|ja|6月14日}} ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|ja|下総国|lt=Shimōsa}} (d. {{ill|1201 AD|ja|1201年}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1644 AD|ja|1644年}} {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (d. {{ill|1678 AD|ja|1678年}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846 AD|ja|1846年}} {{ill|July 17|ja|7月17日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemoto|ja|徳川家茂}} , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (d. {{ill|1866 AD|ja|1866年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871 AD|ja|1871年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939 AD|ja|1939年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636年}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567年}} ).
== Commemorations == *
[[Category:New Pages]] [[ja:年表]]

[[sn:May 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] [[zh:五月廿四]] [[en:draft:May 24 (Lunisolar)]]
{{Lunar May}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|699 AD|ja|699年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1185 AD|ja|1185年}} {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}} ) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshitsune|lt_ja=義経}} , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|ja|腰越}} , and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Koshigoe Letter|ja|腰越状}} ) to {{ill|Ōe Hiromoto|ja|大江広元}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1576 AD|ja|1576年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790年}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reisō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (d. {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}} ). * {{ill|Gennin|ja|元永}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1118 AD|ja|1118年}} {{ill|June 14|ja|6月14日}} ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|ja|下総国|lt=Shimōsa}} (d. {{ill|1201 AD|ja|1201年}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1644 AD|ja|1644年}} {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (d. {{ill|1678 AD|ja|1678年}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846 AD|ja|1846年}} {{ill|July 17|ja|7月17日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemoto|ja|徳川家茂}} , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (d. {{ill|1866 AD|ja|1866年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871 AD|ja|1871年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939 AD|ja|1939年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636年}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567年}} ).
== Commemorations == *
[[Category:New Pages]] [[ja:年表]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|23|5|25|4|24|6|5|0524}}

[[sn:May 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] [[zh:五月廿四]] [[en:draft:May 24 (Lunisolar)]]
{{Lunar May}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|699 AD|ja|699年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1185 AD|ja|1185年}} {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}} ) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshitsune|lt_ja=義経}} , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|ja|腰越}} , and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Koshigoe Letter|ja|腰越状}} ) to {{ill|Ōe Hiromoto|ja|大江広元}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1576 AD|ja|1576年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790年}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reisō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (d. {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}} ). * {{ill|Gennin|ja|元永}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1118 AD|ja|1118年}} {{ill|June 14|ja|6月14日}} ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|ja|下総国|lt=Shimōsa}} (d. {{ill|1201 AD|ja|1201年}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1644 AD|ja|1644年}} {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (d. {{ill|1678 AD|ja|1678年}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846 AD|ja|1846年}} {{ill|July 17|ja|7月17日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemoto|ja|徳川家茂}} , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (d. {{ill|1866 AD|ja|1866年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871 AD|ja|1871年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939 AD|ja|1939年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636年}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567年}} ).
== Commemorations == *
[[Category:Completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 1]] [[ja:年表]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|23|5|25|4|24|6|5|0524}}

[[sn:May 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] [[zh:五月廿四]] [[en:draft:May 24 (Lunisolar)]]

== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|699 AD|ja|699年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1185 AD|ja|1185年}} {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}} ) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshitsune|lt_ja=義経}} , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|ja|腰越}} , and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Koshigoe Letter|ja|腰越状}} ) to {{ill|Ōe Hiromoto|ja|大江広元}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1576 AD|ja|1576年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790年}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reisō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (d. {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}} ). * {{ill|Gennin|ja|元永}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1118 AD|ja|1118年}} {{ill|June 14|ja|6月14日}} ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|ja|下総国|lt=Shimōsa}} (d. {{ill|1201 AD|ja|1201年}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1644 AD|ja|1644年}} {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (d. {{ill|1678 AD|ja|1678年}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846 AD|ja|1846年}} {{ill|July 17|ja|7月17日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemoto|ja|徳川家茂}} , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (d. {{ill|1866 AD|ja|1866年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871 AD|ja|1871年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939 AD|ja|1939年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636年}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567年}} ).
== Commemorations == *
[[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: tier 1]] [[ja:年表]] == See Also ==

[[sn:May 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] [[zh:五月廿四]] [[en:draft:May 24 (Lunisolar)]]
{{Lunar May}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|699 AD|ja|699年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1185 AD|ja|1185年}} {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}} ) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshitsune|lt_ja=義経}} , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|ja|腰越}} , and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Koshigoe Letter|ja|腰越状}} ) to {{ill|Ōe Hiromoto|ja|大江広元}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1576 AD|ja|1576年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790年}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reisō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (d. {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}} ). * {{ill|Gennin|ja|元永}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1118 AD|ja|1118年}} {{ill|June 14|ja|6月14日}} ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|ja|下総国|lt=Shimōsa}} (d. {{ill|1201 AD|ja|1201年}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1644 AD|ja|1644年}} {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (d. {{ill|1678 AD|ja|1678年}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846 AD|ja|1846年}} {{ill|July 17|ja|7月17日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemoto|ja|徳川家茂}} , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (d. {{ill|1866 AD|ja|1866年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871 AD|ja|1871年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939 AD|ja|1939年}} ).

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵== See Also! ==" to " == See Also! =="
revision.text:
[[sn:May 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] [[zh:五月廿四]] [[en:draft:May 24 (Lunisolar)]]
{{Lunar May}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|699 AD|ja|699年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1185 AD|ja|1185年}} {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}} ) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshitsune|lt_ja=義経}} , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|ja|腰越}} , and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Koshigoe Letter|ja|腰越状}} ) to {{ill|Ōe Hiromoto|ja|大江広元}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1576 AD|ja|1576年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790年}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reisō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (d. {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}} ). * {{ill|Gennin|ja|元永}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1118 AD|ja|1118年}} {{ill|June 14|ja|6月14日}} ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|ja|下総国|lt=Shimōsa}} (d. {{ill|1201 AD|ja|1201年}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1644 AD|ja|1644年}} {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (d. {{ill|1678 AD|ja|1678年}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846 AD|ja|1846年}} {{ill|July 17|ja|7月17日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemoto|ja|徳川家茂}} , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (d. {{ill|1866 AD|ja|1866年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871 AD|ja|1871年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939 AD|ja|1939年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636年}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567年}} ).
== Commemorations == *
[[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: tier 1]] [[ja:年表]] == See Also! ==

== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636年}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567年}} ).

[[sn:May 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] [[zh:五月廿四]] [[en:draft:May 24 (Lunisolar)]]
{{Lunar May}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|699 AD|ja|699年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1185 AD|ja|1185年}} {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}} ) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshitsune|lt_ja=義経}} , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|ja|腰越}} , and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Koshigoe Letter|ja|腰越状}} ) to {{ill|Ōe Hiromoto|ja|大江広元}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1576 AD|ja|1576年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790年}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reisō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (d. {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011th year }} ). * {{ill|Gennin|ja|元永}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1118 AD|ja|1118年}} {{ill|June 14|ja|6月14日}} ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|ja|下総国|lt=Shimōsa}} (d. {{ill|1201 AD|ja|1201st year }} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1644 AD|ja|1644年}} {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (d. {{ill|1678 AD|ja|1678年}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846 AD|ja|1846年}} {{ill|July 17|ja|7月17日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemoto|ja|徳川家茂}} , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (d. {{ill|1866 AD|ja|1866年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871 AD|ja|1871st year }} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939 AD|ja|1939年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636年}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567年}} ).

[[sn:May 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] [[zh:五月廿四]] [[en:draft:May 24 (Lunisolar)]]
{{Lunar May}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|699 AD|ja|699年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1185 AD|ja|1185th year }} {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}} ) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshitsune|lt_ja=義経}} , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|ja|腰越}} , and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Koshigoe Letter|ja|腰越状}} ) to {{ill|Ōe Hiromoto|ja|大江広元}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1576 AD|ja|1576年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790年}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reisō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (d. {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011th year }} ). * {{ill|Gennin|ja|元永}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1118 AD|ja|1118年}} {{ill|June 14|ja|6月14日}} ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|ja|下総国|lt=Shimōsa}} (d. {{ill|1201 AD|ja|1201st year }} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1644 AD|ja|1644th year }} {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (d. {{ill|1678 AD|ja|1678年}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846 AD|ja|1846年}} {{ill|July 17|ja|7月17日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemoto|ja|徳川家茂}} , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (d. {{ill|1866 AD|ja|1866年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871 AD|ja|1871st year }} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939 AD|ja|1939年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636年}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567年}} ).
== Commemorations == *

[[sn:May 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] [[zh:五月廿四]] [[en:draft:May 24 (Lunisolar)]]
{{Lunar May}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|699 AD|ja|699th year }} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1185 AD|ja|1185th year }} {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}} ) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshitsune|lt_ja=義経}} , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|ja|腰越}} , and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Koshigoe Letter|ja|腰越状}} ) to {{ill|Ōe Hiromoto|ja|大江広元}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1576 AD|ja|1576年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790年}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reisō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (d. {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011th year }} ). * {{ill|Gennin|ja|元永}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1118 AD|ja|1118th year }} {{ill|June 14|ja|6月14日}} ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|ja|下総国|lt=Shimōsa}} (d. {{ill|1201 AD|ja|1201st year }} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1644 AD|ja|1644th year }} {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (d. {{ill|1678 AD|ja|1678th year }} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846 AD|ja|1846年}} {{ill|July 17|ja|7月17日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemoto|ja|徳川家茂}} , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (d. {{ill|1866 AD|ja|1866年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871 AD|ja|1871st year }} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939 AD|ja|1939th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636年}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567th year }} ).
== Commemorations == *
[[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: tier 1]] [[ja:年表]] == See Also ==
