[[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:May 24 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:May 24 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:May 24 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:May 24 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:May 24 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:May 24 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]]
{{Lunisolar May}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|699 AD|ja|699th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1185 AD|ja|1185th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshitsune|lt_ja=義経|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|ja|腰越|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Koshigoe Letter|ja|腰越状|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) to {{ill|Ōe Hiromoto|ja|大江広元|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1576 AD|ja|1576th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|950 AD|ja|950th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reisō|ja|冷泉天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Gennin|ja|元永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1118 AD|ja|1118th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 14|ja|6月14日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|ja|下総国|lt=Shimōsa|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. {{ill|1201 AD|ja|1201st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1644 AD|ja|1644th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. {{ill|1678 AD|ja|1678th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1846 AD|ja|1846th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 17|ja|7月17日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemoto|ja|徳川家茂|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. {{ill|1866 AD|ja|1866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871 AD|ja|1871st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939 AD|ja|1939th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations == *
== See Also ==

{{Lunisolar May}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|699 AD|ja|699th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1185 AD|ja|1185th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshitsune|lt_ja=義経|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|ja|腰越|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Koshigoe Letter|ja|腰越状|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) to {{ill|Ōe Hiromoto|ja|大江広元|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1576 AD|ja|1576th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580 AD|ja|1580th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1790 AD|ja|1790th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|950 AD|ja|950th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reisō|ja|冷泉天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Gennin|ja|元永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1118 AD|ja|1118th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 14|ja|6月14日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|ja|下総国|lt=Shimōsa|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. {{ill|1201 AD|ja|1201st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1644 AD|ja|1644th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. {{ill|1678 AD|ja|1678th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1846 AD|ja|1846th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 17|ja|7月17日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemoto|ja|徳川家茂|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. {{ill|1866 AD|ja|1866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871 AD|ja|1871st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939 AD|ja|1939th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1636 AD|ja|1636th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|ja|伊達政宗|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1567 AD|ja|1567th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations == *

16 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:5月24日 (旧暦) up to rev 100472246
revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月24日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の24日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[文武天皇]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[699年]][[6月26日]]） - 修験道の開祖・[[役行者]]（役小角）が弟子の讒言により[[伊豆国|伊豆]]に流罪 * [[文治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1185年]][[6月23日]]） - [[源頼朝]]の不興を解く為に鎌倉へ向かった[[源義経|義経]]が、[[腰越]]で留められたため書状（[[腰越状]]）を大江広元に託す * [[天正]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1576年]][[6月20日]]） - [[前田利家]]が、[[越前一向一揆]]の捕虜千人ほどを処刑。[[磔]]・[[釜茹で]]にした。（一向一揆文字瓦、年代は推定。天正8年、ユリウス暦[[1580年]][[7月5日]]説もある） * [[寛政]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1790年]][[7月6日]]） - [[寛政異学の禁]]。[[松平定信]]が、[[朱子学]]以外の学問を異学として[[湯島聖堂]]での教授を禁止
== 誕生日 == * [[天暦]]4年（ユリウス暦[[950年]][[6月12日]]） - [[冷泉天皇]]、63代[[天皇]]（+ [[1011年]]） * [[元永]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1118年]][[6月14日]]） - [[千葉常胤]]、[[武将]]・[[下総国|下総]]守護（+ [[1201年]]） * [[正保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1644年]][[6月28日]]） - [[徳川綱重]]、初代[[甲府藩]]主・[[徳川家光]]の三男・[[徳川家宣]]の父（+ [[1678年]]） * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[7月17日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]、[[江戸幕府]]14代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1866年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[7月11日]]） - [[喜田貞吉]]、[[歴史家|歴史学者]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1636年]][[6月27日]]） - [[伊達政宗]]、[[武将]]・初代[[仙台藩]]主（* [[1567年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|23|5|25|4|24|6|5|0524}}

{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月24日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の24日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[文武天皇]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[699年]][[6月26日]]） - 修験道の開祖・[[役行者]]（役小角）が弟子の讒言により[[伊豆国|伊豆]]に流罪 * [[文治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1185年]][[6月23日]]） - [[源頼朝]]の不興を解く為に鎌倉へ向かった[[源義経|義経]]が、[[腰越]]で留められたため書状（[[腰越状]]）を大江広元に託す * [[天正]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1576年]][[6月20日]]） - [[前田利家]]が、[[越前一向一揆]]の捕虜千人ほどを処刑。[[磔]]・[[釜茹で]]にした。（一向一揆文字瓦、年代は推定。天正8年、ユリウス暦[[1580年]][[7月5日]]説もある） * [[寛政]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1790年]][[7月6日]]） - [[寛政異学の禁]]。[[松平定信]]が、[[朱子学]]以外の学問を異学として[[湯島聖堂]]での教授を禁止

== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1636年]][[6月27日]]） - [[伊達政宗]]、[[武将]]・初代[[仙台藩]]主（* [[1567年]]）

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|May 24|qq=May 24}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:699|699 AD]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/En no Ozunu|qq=}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|qq=}} due to slander from his disciples. * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185 AD]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]] ) – To appease [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] , [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshitsune]] , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at [[:en:Koshigoe|Koshigoe]] , and thus entrusted a letter (the [[:en:Letter from Koshigoe|Koshigoe Letter]] ) to [[:en:Ōe no Hiromoto|Ōe Hiromoto]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576 AD]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshiie|qq=}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echizen Ikko-ikki|qq=}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ([[:en:1580|1580 AD]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1790|1790 AD]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]] ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] banning the teaching of subjects other than [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] at [[:en:Yushima Seidō|Yushima Seidō]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:950|950 AD]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Emperor Reisō]] , the 63rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (d. [[:en:1011|1011 AD]] ). * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gennin]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1118|1118 AD]] [[:en:June 14|June 14]] ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|qq=}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa]] (d. [[:en:1201|1201 AD]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1644|1644 AD]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , the first lord of the [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , the third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and the father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (d. [[:en:1678|1678 AD]] ). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd Year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846 AD]] [[:en:July 17|July 17]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemoto]] , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=}} (d. [[:en:1866|1866 AD]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871 AD]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. [[:en:1939|1939 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 13th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1636|1636 AD]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]] ) – [[:en:Date Masamune|Date Masamune]] , a military commander and the first lord of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (born [[:en:1567|1567 AD]] ).
== Commemorations == *
== See Also ==

(Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ([[:en:1580|1580 AD]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1790|1790 AD]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]] ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] banning the teaching of subjects other than [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] at [[:en:Yushima Seidō|Yushima Seidō]] .

[[:en:1011|1011 AD]] ). * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gennin]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1118|1118 AD]] [[:en:June 14|June 14]] ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|qq=}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa]] (d. {{Not to be confused with|May 24|qq=May 24}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:699|699 AD]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/En no Ozunu|qq=}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|qq=}} due to slander from his disciples. * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185 AD]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]] ) – To appease [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] , [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshitsune]] , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at [[:en:Koshigoe|Koshigoe]] , and thus entrusted a letter (the [[:en:Letter from Koshigoe|Koshigoe Letter]] ) to [[:en:Ōe no Hiromoto|Ōe Hiromoto]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576 AD]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshiie|qq=}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echizen Ikko-ikki|qq=}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ([[:en:1580|1580 AD]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1790|1790 AD]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]] ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] banning the teaching of subjects other than [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] at [[:en:Yushima Seidō|Yushima Seidō]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:950|950 AD]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Emperor Reisō]] , the 63rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (d. [[:en:1011|1011 AD]] ). * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gennin]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1118|1118 AD]] [[:en:June 14|June 14]] ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|qq=}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa]] (d. [[:en:1201|1201 AD]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1644|1644 AD]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , the first lord of the [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , the third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and the father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (d. [[:en:1678|1678 AD]] ). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd Year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846 AD]] [[:en:July 17|July 17]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemoto]] , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=}} (d. [[:en:1866|1866 AD]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871 AD]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. [[:en:1939|1939 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 13th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1636|1636 AD]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]] ) – [[:en:Date Masamune|Date Masamune]] , a military commander and the first lord of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (born [[:en:1567|1567 AD]] ).
== Commemorations == *

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:699|699 AD]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/En no Ozunu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 役小角}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} due to slander from his disciples. * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185 AD]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]] ) – To appease [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] , [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshitsune]] , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at [[:en:Koshigoe|Koshigoe]] , and thus entrusted a letter (the [[:en:Letter from Koshigoe|Koshigoe Letter]] ) to [[:en:Ōe no Hiromoto|Ōe Hiromoto]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576 AD]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshiie|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echizen Ikko-ikki|qq=}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ([[:en:1580|1580 AD]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] )). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1790|1790 AD]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]] ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] banning the teaching of subjects other than [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] at [[:en:Yushima Seidō|Yushima Seidō]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:950|950 AD]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Emperor Reisō]] , the 63rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (d. [[:en:1011|1011 AD]] ). * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gennin]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1118|1118 AD]] [[:en:June 14|June 14]] ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|qq=}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa]] (d. [[:en:1201|1201 AD]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1644|1644 AD]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , the first lord of the [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , the third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and the father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (d. [[:en:1678|1678 AD]] ). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd Year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846 AD]] [[:en:July 17|July 17]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemoto]] , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. [[:en:1866|1866 AD]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871 AD]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. [[:en:1939|1939 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 13th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1636|1636 AD]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]] ) – [[:en:Date Masamune|Date Masamune]] , a military commander and the first lord of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (born [[:en:1567|1567 AD]] ).

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839627]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 24|qq=May 24}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:699|699 AD]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/En no Ozunu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 役小角|1=En no Gyōja|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q198946}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} due to slander from his disciples. * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185 AD]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]] ) – To appease [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] , [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshitsune]] , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at [[:en:Koshigoe|Koshigoe]] , and thus entrusted a letter (the [[:en:Letter from Koshigoe|Koshigoe Letter]] ) to [[:en:Ōe no Hiromoto|Ōe Hiromoto]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576 AD]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshiie|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echizen Ikko-ikki|qq=|1=Echizen ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636409}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ([[:en:1580|1580 AD]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] )). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1790|1790 AD]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]] ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] banning the teaching of subjects other than [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] at [[:en:Yushima Seidō|Yushima Seidō]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:950|950 AD]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Emperor Reisō]] , the 63rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (d. [[:en:1011|1011 AD]] ). * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gennin]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1118|1118 AD]] [[:en:June 14|June 14]] ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|qq=|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa]] (d. [[:en:1201|1201 AD]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1644|1644 AD]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , the first lord of the [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , the third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and the father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (d. [[:en:1678|1678 AD]] ). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd Year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846 AD]] [[:en:July 17|July 17]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemoto]] , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. [[:en:1866|1866 AD]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871 AD]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. [[:en:1939|1939 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 13th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1636|1636 AD]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]] ) – [[:en:Date Masamune|Date Masamune]] , a military commander and the first lord of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (born [[:en:1567|1567 AD]] ).
== Commemorations == *
== See Also ==

revision.comment: Bot: categorize based on Wikidata P11250 property
revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839627]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 24|qq=May 24}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:699|699 AD]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/En no Ozunu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 役小角|1=En no Gyōja|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q198946}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} due to slander from his disciples. * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185 AD]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]] ) – To appease [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] , [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshitsune]] , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at [[:en:Koshigoe|Koshigoe]] , and thus entrusted a letter (the [[:en:Letter from Koshigoe|Koshigoe Letter]] ) to [[:en:Ōe no Hiromoto|Ōe Hiromoto]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576 AD]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshiie|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echizen Ikko-ikki|qq=|1=Echizen ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636409}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ([[:en:1580|1580 AD]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] )). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1790|1790 AD]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]] ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] banning the teaching of subjects other than [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] at [[:en:Yushima Seidō|Yushima Seidō]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:950|950 AD]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Emperor Reisō]] , the 63rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (d. [[:en:1011|1011 AD]] ). * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gennin]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1118|1118 AD]] [[:en:June 14|June 14]] ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|qq=|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa]] (d. [[:en:1201|1201 AD]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1644|1644 AD]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , the first lord of the [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , the third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and the father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (d. [[:en:1678|1678 AD]] ). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd Year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846 AD]] [[:en:July 17|July 17]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemoto]] , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. [[:en:1866|1866 AD]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871 AD]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. [[:en:1939|1939 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 13th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1636|1636 AD]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]] ) – [[:en:Date Masamune|Date Masamune]] , a military commander and the first lord of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (born [[:en:1567|1567 AD]] ).
== Commemorations == *
== See Also ==

[[:en:1678|1678 AD]] ). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd Year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846 AD]] [[:en:July 17|July 17]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemoto]] , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:699|699 AD]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/En no Ozunu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 役小角|1=En no Gyōja|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q198946}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} due to slander from his disciples. * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185 AD]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]] ) – To appease [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] , [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshitsune]] , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at [[:en:Koshigoe|Koshigoe]] , and thus entrusted a letter (the [[:en:Letter from Koshigoe|Koshigoe Letter]] ) to [[:en:Ōe no Hiromoto|Ōe Hiromoto]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576 AD]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshiie|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echizen Ikko-ikki|qq=|1=Echizen ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636409}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ([[:en:1580|1580 AD]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] )). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1790|1790 AD]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]] ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] banning the teaching of subjects other than [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] at [[:en:Yushima Seidō|Yushima Seidō]] .

[[:en:1011|1011 AD]] ). * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gennin]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1118|1118 AD]] [[:en:June 14|June 14]] ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|qq=|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa]] (d. [[:en:1866|1866 AD]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871 AD]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. == Events == * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:699|699 AD]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/En no Ozunu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 役小角|1=En no Gyōja|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q198946}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} due to slander from his disciples. * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185 AD]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]] ) – To appease [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] , [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshitsune]] , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at [[:en:Koshigoe|Koshigoe]] , and thus entrusted a letter (the [[:en:Letter from Koshigoe|Koshigoe Letter]] ) to [[:en:Ōe no Hiromoto|Ōe Hiromoto]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576 AD]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshiie|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echizen Ikko-ikki|qq=|1=Echizen ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636409}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ([[:en:1580|1580 AD]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] )). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1790|1790 AD]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]] ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] banning the teaching of subjects other than [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] at [[:en:Yushima Seidō|Yushima Seidō]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:950|950 AD]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Emperor Reisō]] , the 63rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (d. [[:en:1011|1011 AD]] ). * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gennin]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1118|1118 AD]] [[:en:June 14|June 14]] ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|qq=|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa]] (d. [[:en:1201|1201 AD]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1644|1644 AD]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , the first lord of the [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , the third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and the father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (d. [[:en:1678|1678 AD]] ). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd Year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846 AD]] [[:en:July 17|July 17]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemoto]] , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. [[:en:1866|1866 AD]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871 AD]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. [[:en:1939|1939 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 13th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1636|1636 AD]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]] ) – [[:en:Date Masamune|Date Masamune]] , a military commander and the first lord of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (born [[:en:1567|1567 AD]] ).

[[ko:음력 5월 24일]] [[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:五月廿四]]
[[ja:年表]]
[[ar:May 24 (Lunisolar)]]
[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] {{wikidata link|Q839627}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Matching pagename on wikidata]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿四]][[zh:五月廿四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839627]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 24|qq=May 24}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:699|699 AD]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/En no Ozunu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 役小角|1=En no Gyōja|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q198946}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} due to slander from his disciples. * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185 AD]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]] ) – To appease [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] , [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshitsune]] , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at [[:en:Koshigoe|Koshigoe]] , and thus entrusted a letter (the [[:en:Letter from Koshigoe|Koshigoe Letter]] ) to [[:en:Ōe no Hiromoto|Ōe Hiromoto]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576 AD]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshiie|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echizen Ikko-ikki|1=Echizen ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636409}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ([[:en:1580|1580 AD]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] )). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1790|1790 AD]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]] ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] banning the teaching of subjects other than [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] at [[:en:Yushima Seidō|Yushima Seidō]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:950|950 AD]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Emperor Reisō]] , the 63rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (d. [[:en:1011|1011 AD]] ). * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gennin]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1118|1118 AD]] [[:en:June 14|June 14]] ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa]] (d. [[:en:1201|1201 AD]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1644|1644 AD]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , the first lord of the [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , the third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and the father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (d. [[:en:1678|1678 AD]] ). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd Year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846 AD]] [[:en:July 17|July 17]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemoto]] , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. [[:en:1866|1866 AD]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871 AD]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. [[:en:1939|1939 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 13th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1636|1636 AD]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]] ) – [[:en:Date Masamune|Date Masamune]] , a military commander and the first lord of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (born [[:en:1567|1567 AD]] ).
== Commemorations == *

[[:en:1866|1866 AD]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871 AD]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. [[:en:1939|1939 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 13th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1636|1636 AD]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]] ) – [[:en:Date Masamune|Date Masamune]] , a military commander and the first lord of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (born [[:en:1567|1567 AD]] ).

revision.comment: Bot: Add Wikidata has short description - based on Wikidata English short description
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿四]][[zh:五月廿四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839627]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 24|qq=May 24}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:699|699 AD]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/En no Ozunu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 役小角|1=En no Gyōja|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q198946}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} due to slander from his disciples. * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185 AD]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]] ) – To appease [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] , [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshitsune]] , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at [[:en:Koshigoe|Koshigoe]] , and thus entrusted a letter (the [[:en:Letter from Koshigoe|Koshigoe Letter]] ) to [[:en:Ōe no Hiromoto|Ōe Hiromoto]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576 AD]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshiie|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echizen Ikko-ikki|1=Echizen ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636409}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ([[:en:1580|1580 AD]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] )). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1790|1790 AD]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]] ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] banning the teaching of subjects other than [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] at [[:en:Yushima Seidō|Yushima Seidō]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:950|950 AD]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Emperor Reisō]] , the 63rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (d. [[:en:1011|1011 AD]] ). * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gennin]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1118|1118 AD]] [[:en:June 14|June 14]] ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa]] (d. [[:en:1201|1201 AD]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1644|1644 AD]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , the first lord of the [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , the third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and the father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (d. [[:en:1678|1678 AD]] ). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd Year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846 AD]] [[:en:July 17|July 17]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemoto]] , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. [[:en:1866|1866 AD]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871 AD]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. [[:en:1939|1939 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 13th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1636|1636 AD]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]] ) – [[:en:Date Masamune|Date Masamune]] , a military commander and the first lord of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (born [[:en:1567|1567 AD]] ).

(Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ([[:en:1580|1580 AD]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] )). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1790|1790 AD]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]] ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] banning the teaching of subjects other than [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] at [[:en:Yushima Seidō|Yushima Seidō]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:950|950 AD]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Emperor Reisō]] , the 63rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (d. [[:en:1011|1011 AD]] ). * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gennin]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1118|1118 AD]] [[:en:June 14|June 14]] ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa]] (d. [[:en:1201|1201 AD]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1644|1644 AD]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , the first lord of the [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , the third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and the father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (d. [[:en:1678|1678 AD]] ). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd Year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846 AD]] [[:en:July 17|July 17]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemoto]] , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. [[:en:1866|1866 AD]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871 AD]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. [[:en:1939|1939 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 13th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1636|1636 AD]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]] ) – [[:en:Date Masamune|Date Masamune]] , a military commander and the first lord of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (born [[:en:1567|1567 AD]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿四]][[zh:五月廿四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839627]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 24|qq=May 24}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:699|699 AD]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/En no Ozunu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 役小角|1=En no Gyōja|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q198946}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} due to slander from his disciples. * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185 AD]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]] ) – To appease [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] , [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshitsune]] , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at [[:en:Koshigoe|Koshigoe]] , and thus entrusted a letter (the [[:en:Letter from Koshigoe|Koshigoe Letter]] ) to [[:en:Ōe no Hiromoto|Ōe Hiromoto]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576 AD]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshiie|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echizen Ikko-ikki|1=Echizen ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636409}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ([[:en:1580|1580 AD]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] )). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1790|1790 AD]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]] ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] banning the teaching of subjects other than [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] at [[:en:Yushima Seidō|Yushima Seidō]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:950|950 AD]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Emperor Reisō]] , the 63rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (d. [[:en:1011|1011 AD]] ). * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gennin]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1118|1118 AD]] [[:en:June 14|June 14]] ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa]] (d. [[:en:1201|1201 AD]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1644|1644 AD]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , the first lord of the [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , the third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and the father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (d. [[:en:1678|1678 AD]] ). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd Year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846 AD]] [[:en:July 17|July 17]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemoto]] , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. [[:en:1866|1866 AD]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871 AD]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. [[:en:1939|1939 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 13th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1636|1636 AD]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]] ) – [[:en:Date Masamune|Date Masamune]] , a military commander and the first lord of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (born [[:en:1567|1567 AD]] ).
== Commemorations == *
== See Also ==

[[:en:1866|1866 AD]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871 AD]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. [[:en:1939|1939 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 13th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1636|1636 AD]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]] ) – [[:en:Date Masamune|Date Masamune]] , a military commander and the first lord of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (born [[:en:1567|1567 AD]] ).

[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿四]] {{wikidata link|Q839627}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 24일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿四]][[zh:五月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 24일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿四]][[zh:五月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿四]][[zh:五月廿四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839627]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 24|qq=May 24}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:699|699 AD]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/En no Ozunu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 役小角|1=En no Gyōja|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q198946}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} due to slander from his disciples. * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185 AD]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]] ) – To appease [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] , [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshitsune]] , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at [[:en:Koshigoe|Koshigoe]] , and thus entrusted a letter (the [[:en:Letter from Koshigoe|Koshigoe Letter]] ) to [[:en:Ōe no Hiromoto|Ōe Hiromoto]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576 AD]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshiie|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echizen Ikko-ikki|1=Echizen ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636409}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ([[:en:1580|1580 AD]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] )). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1790|1790 AD]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]] ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] banning the teaching of subjects other than [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] at [[:en:Yushima Seidō|Yushima Seidō]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:950|950 AD]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Emperor Reisō]] , the 63rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (d. [[:en:1011|1011 AD]] ). * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gennin]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1118|1118 AD]] [[:en:June 14|June 14]] ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa]] (d. [[:en:1201|1201 AD]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1644|1644 AD]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , the first lord of the [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , the third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and the father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (d. [[:en:1678|1678 AD]] ). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd Year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846 AD]] [[:en:July 17|July 17]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemoto]] , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. [[:en:1866|1866 AD]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871 AD]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. [[:en:1939|1939 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 13th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1636|1636 AD]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]] ) – [[:en:Date Masamune|Date Masamune]] , a military commander and the first lord of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (born [[:en:1567|1567 AD]] ).
