== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:699|699 AD]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/En no Ozunu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 役小角|1=En no Gyōja|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q198946}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} due to slander from his disciples. * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185 AD]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]] ) – To appease [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] , [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshitsune]] , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at [[:en:Koshigoe|Koshigoe]] , and thus entrusted a letter (the [[:en:Letter from Koshigoe|Koshigoe Letter]] ) to [[:en:Ōe no Hiromoto|Ōe Hiromoto]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576 AD]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshiie|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echizen Ikko-ikki|1=Echizen ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636409}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ([[:en:1580|1580 AD]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] )). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1790|1790 AD]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]] ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] banning the teaching of subjects other than [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] at [[:en:Yushima Seidō|Yushima Seidō]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:950|950 AD]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Emperor Reisō]] , the 63rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (d. [[:en:1011|1011 AD]] ). * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gennin]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1118|1118 AD]] [[:en:June 14|June 14]] ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa]] (d. [[:en:1201|1201 AD]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1644|1644 AD]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , the first lord of the [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , the third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and the father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (d. [[:en:1678|1678 AD]] ). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd Year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846 AD]] [[:en:July 17|July 17]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemoto]] , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. [[:en:1866|1866 AD]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871 AD]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. [[:en:1939|1939 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 13th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1636|1636 AD]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]] ) – [[:en:Date Masamune|Date Masamune]] , a military commander and the first lord of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (born [[:en:1567|1567 AD]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 24일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿四]][[zh:五月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 24일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿四]][[zh:五月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿四]][[zh:五月廿四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839627]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 24|qq=May 24}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:699|699 AD]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/En no Ozunu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 役小角|1=En no Gyōja|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q198946}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} due to slander from his disciples. * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185 AD]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]] ) – To appease [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] , [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshitsune]] , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at [[:en:Koshigoe|Koshigoe]] , and thus entrusted a letter (the [[:en:Letter from Koshigoe|Koshigoe Letter]] ) to [[:en:Ōe no Hiromoto|Ōe Hiromoto]] . * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576 AD]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshiie|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echizen Ikko-ikki|1=Echizen ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636409}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ([[:en:1580|1580 AD]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] )). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1790|1790 AD]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]] ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] banning the teaching of subjects other than [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] at [[:en:Yushima Seidō|Yushima Seidō]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:950|950 AD]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Emperor Reisō]] , the 63rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (d. [[:en:1011|1011 AD]] ). * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gennin]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1118|1118 AD]] [[:en:June 14|June 14]] ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa]] (d. [[:en:1201|1201 AD]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1644|1644 AD]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , the first lord of the [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , the third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and the father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (d. [[:en:1678|1678 AD]] ). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd Year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846 AD]] [[:en:July 17|July 17]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemoto]] , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. [[:en:1866|1866 AD]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871 AD]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. [[:en:1939|1939 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 13th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1636|1636 AD]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]] ) – [[:en:Date Masamune|Date Masamune]] , a military commander and the first lord of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (born [[:en:1567|1567 AD]] ).
== Commemorations == *

[[:en:1011|1011 AD]] ). * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gennin]] 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1118|1118 AD]] [[:en:June 14|June 14]] ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa]] (d. [[:en:1201|1201 AD]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1644|1644 AD]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , the first lord of the [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , the third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and the father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (d. [[:en:1678|1678 AD]] ). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd Year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846 AD]] [[:en:July 17|July 17]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemoto]] , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. [[:en:1866|1866 AD]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871 AD]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. [[:en:1939|1939 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 13th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1636|1636 AD]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]] ) – [[:en:Date Masamune|Date Masamune]] , a military commander and the first lord of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (born [[:en:1567|1567 AD]] ).
== Commemorations == *

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿四]][[zh:五月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿四]][[zh:五月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿四]][[zh:五月廿四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839627]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 24|qq=May 24}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|WD=Q357246|lt=Emperor Monmu}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|699|en|699|WD=Q23493|lt=699 AD}} {{ill|June 26|en|June 26|WD=Q2661|lt=June 26}} ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/En no Ozunu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 役小角|1=En no Gyōja|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q198946}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|WD=Q1194415|lt=Bunji}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1185|en|1185|WD=Q19729|lt=1185 AD}} {{ill|June 23|en|June 23|WD=Q2668|lt=June 23}} ) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|WD=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|en|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|WD=Q310445|lt=Yoshitsune}} , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|en|Koshigoe|WD=Q6433121|lt=Koshigoe}} , and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Letter from Koshigoe|en|Letter from Koshigoe|WD=Q11612346|lt=Koshigoe Letter}} ) to {{ill|Ōe no Hiromoto|en|Ōe no Hiromoto|WD=Q384829|lt=Ōe Hiromoto}} . * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1576|en|1576|WD=Q6700|lt=1576 AD}} {{ill|June 20|en|June 20|WD=Q2666|lt=June 20}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshiie|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echizen Ikko-ikki|1=Echizen ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636409}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580|en|1580|WD=Q6712|lt=1580 AD}} {{ill|July 5|en|July 5|WD=Q2696|lt=July 5}} )). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1790|en|1790|WD=Q7775|lt=1790 AD}} {{ill|July 6|en|July 6|WD=Q2695|lt=July 6}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|en|Matsudaira Sadanobu|WD=Q284038|lt=Matsudaira Sadanobu}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Cheng–Zhu school|en|Cheng–Zhu school|WD=Q841735|lt=Neo-Confucianism}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|en|Yushima Seidō|WD=Q1760591|lt=Yushima Seidō}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|en|Tenryaku|WD=Q1346281|lt=Tenryaku}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|950|en|950|WD=Q23449|lt=950 AD}} {{ill|June 12|en|June 12|WD=Q2619|lt=June 12}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reizei|en|Emperor Reizei|WD=Q374125|lt=Emperor Reisō}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor}} (d. {{ill|1011|en|1011|WD=Q19238|lt=1011 AD}} ). * {{ill|Gen'ei|en|Gen'ei|WD=Q1193613|lt=Gennin}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1118|en|1118|WD=Q19539|lt=1118 AD}} {{ill|June 14|en|June 14|WD=Q2612|lt=June 14}} ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|en|Shimōsa Province|WD=Q1053695|lt=Shimōsa}} (d. {{ill|1201|en|1201|WD=Q5225|lt=1201 AD}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|en|Shōhō|WD=Q1146192|lt=Shōhō}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1644|en|1644|WD=Q6920|lt=1644 AD}} {{ill|June 28|en|June 28|WD=Q2660|lt=June 28}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|en|Tokugawa Tsunashige|WD=Q7004484|lt=Tokugawa Tsunashige}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|en|Kōfu Domain|WD=Q661116|lt=Kōfu Domain}} , the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|WD=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} , and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|en|Tokugawa Ienobu|WD=Q366734|lt=Tokugawa Ienobu}} (d. {{ill|1678|en|1678|WD=Q7634|lt=1678 AD}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|WD=Q1325317|lt=Kōka}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1846|en|1846|WD=Q7640|lt=1846 AD}} {{ill|July 17|en|July 17|WD=Q2729|lt=July 17}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|en|Tokugawa Iemochi|WD=Q348466|lt=Tokugawa Iemoto}} , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. {{ill|1866|en|1866|WD=Q7712|lt=1866 AD}} ). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871 AD}} {{ill|July 11|en|July 11|WD=Q2701|lt=July 11}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939|en|1939|WD=Q18639|lt=1939 AD}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1636|en|1636|WD=Q6885|lt=1636 AD}} {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|en|Date Masamune|WD=Q311183|lt=Date Masamune}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|en|Sendai Domain|WD=Q1062182|lt=Sendai Domain}} (born {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567 AD}} ).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|WD=Q357246|lt=Emperor Monmu}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|699|en|699|WD=Q23493|lt=699 AD}} {{ill|June 26|en|June 26|WD=Q2661|lt=June 26}} ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/En no Ozunu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 役小角|1=En no Gyōja|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q198946}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|WD=Q1194415|lt=Bunji}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1185|en|1185|WD=Q19729|lt=1185 AD}} {{ill|June 23|en|June 23|WD=Q2668|lt=June 23}} ) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|WD=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|en|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|WD=Q310445|lt=Yoshitsune}} , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|en|Koshigoe|WD=Q6433121|lt=Koshigoe}} , and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Letter from Koshigoe|en|Letter from Koshigoe|WD=Q11612346|lt=Koshigoe Letter}} ) to {{ill|Ōe no Hiromoto|en|Ōe no Hiromoto|WD=Q384829|lt=Ōe Hiromoto}} . * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1576|en|1576|WD=Q6700|lt=1576 AD}} {{ill|June 20|en|June 20|WD=Q2666|lt=June 20}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshiie|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echizen Ikko-ikki|1=Echizen ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636409}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580|en|1580|WD=Q6712|lt=1580 AD}} {{ill|July 5|en|July 5|WD=Q2696|lt=July 5}} )). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1790|en|1790|WD=Q7775|lt=1790 AD}} {{ill|July 6|en|July 6|WD=Q2695|lt=July 6}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|en|Matsudaira Sadanobu|WD=Q284038|lt=Matsudaira Sadanobu}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Cheng–Zhu school|en|Cheng–Zhu school|WD=Q841735|lt=Neo-Confucianism}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|en|Yushima Seidō|WD=Q1760591|lt=Yushima Seidō}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|en|Tenryaku|WD=Q1346281|lt=Tenryaku}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|950|en|950|WD=Q23449|lt=950 AD}} {{ill|June calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871 AD}} {{ill|July 11|en|July 11|WD=Q2701|lt=July 11}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939|en|1939|WD=Q18639|lt=1939 AD}} ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿四]][[zh:五月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿四]][[zh:五月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿四]][[zh:五月廿四]]
{{Not to be confused with|May 24|qq=May 24}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|WD=Q357246|lt=Emperor Monmu}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|699|en|699|WD=Q23493|lt=699 AD}} {{ill|June 26|en|June 26|WD=Q2661|lt=June 26}} ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/En no Ozunu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 役小角|1=En no Gyōja|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q198946}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|WD=Q1194415|lt=Bunji}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1185|en|1185|WD=Q19729|lt=1185 AD}} {{ill|June 23|en|June 23|WD=Q2668|lt=June 23}} ) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|WD=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|en|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|WD=Q310445|lt=Yoshitsune}} , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|en|Koshigoe|WD=Q6433121|lt=Koshigoe}} , and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Letter from Koshigoe|en|Letter from Koshigoe|WD=Q11612346|lt=Koshigoe Letter}} ) to {{ill|Ōe no Hiromoto|en|Ōe no Hiromoto|WD=Q384829|lt=Ōe Hiromoto}} . * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1576|en|1576|WD=Q6700|lt=1576 AD}} {{ill|June 20|en|June 20|WD=Q2666|lt=June 20}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshiie|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echizen Ikko-ikki|1=Echizen ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636409}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580|en|1580|WD=Q6712|lt=1580 AD}} {{ill|July 5|en|July 5|WD=Q2696|lt=July 5}} )). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1790|en|1790|WD=Q7775|lt=1790 AD}} {{ill|July 6|en|July 6|WD=Q2695|lt=July 6}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|en|Matsudaira Sadanobu|WD=Q284038|lt=Matsudaira Sadanobu}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Cheng–Zhu school|en|Cheng–Zhu school|WD=Q841735|lt=Neo-Confucianism}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|en|Yushima Seidō|WD=Q1760591|lt=Yushima Seidō}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|en|Tenryaku|WD=Q1346281|lt=Tenryaku}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|950|en|950|WD=Q23449|lt=950 AD}} {{ill|June 12|en|June 12|WD=Q2619|lt=June 12}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reizei|en|Emperor Reizei|WD=Q374125|lt=Emperor Reisō}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor}} (d. {{ill|1011|en|1011|WD=Q19238|lt=1011 AD}} ). * {{ill|Gen'ei|en|Gen'ei|WD=Q1193613|lt=Gennin}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1118|en|1118|WD=Q19539|lt=1118 AD}} {{ill|June 14|en|June 14|WD=Q2612|lt=June 14}} ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|en|Shimōsa Province|WD=Q1053695|lt=Shimōsa}} (d. {{ill|1201|en|1201|WD=Q5225|lt=1201 AD}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|en|Shōhō|WD=Q1146192|lt=Shōhō}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1644|en|1644|WD=Q6920|lt=1644 AD}} {{ill|June 28|en|June 28|WD=Q2660|lt=June 28}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|en|Tokugawa Tsunashige|WD=Q7004484|lt=Tokugawa Tsunashige}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|en|Kōfu Domain|WD=Q661116|lt=Kōfu Domain}} , the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|WD=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} , and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|en|Tokugawa Ienobu|WD=Q366734|lt=Tokugawa Ienobu}} (d. {{ill|1678|en|1678|WD=Q7634|lt=1678 AD}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|WD=Q1325317|lt=Kōka}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1846|en|1846|WD=Q7640|lt=1846 AD}} {{ill|July 17|en|July 17|WD=Q2729|lt=July 17}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|en|Tokugawa Iemochi|WD=Q348466|lt=Tokugawa Iemoto}} , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. {{ill|1866|en|1866|WD=Q7712|lt=1866 AD}} ). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871 AD}} {{ill|July 11|en|July 11|WD=Q2701|lt=July 11}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939|en|1939|WD=Q18639|lt=1939 AD}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1636|en|1636|WD=Q6885|lt=1636 AD}} {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|en|Date Masamune|WD=Q311183|lt=Date Masamune}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|en|Sendai Domain|WD=Q1062182|lt=Sendai Domain}} (born {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567 AD}} ).
== Commemorations == *

{{Not to be confused with|May 24|qq=May 24}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|WD=Q357246|lt=Emperor Monmu|1=Emperor Monmu}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|699|en|699|WD=Q23493|lt=699 AD|1=699}} {{ill|June 26|en|June 26|WD=Q2661|lt=June 26|1=June 26}} ) – The founder of Shugendō, {{ill|En no Ozunu|ja|役行者|lt=En no Ozunu|lt_ja=役小角|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/En no Ozunu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 役小角|1=En no Gyōja|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q198946}} , was exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|Izu Province|lt=Izu|lt_ja=伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} due to slander from his disciples. * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|WD=Q1194415|lt=Bunji|1=Bunji (era)}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1185|en|1185|WD=Q19729|lt=1185 AD|1=1185}} {{ill|June 23|en|June 23|WD=Q2668|lt=June 23|1=June 23}} ) – To appease {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|WD=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo|1=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|en|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|WD=Q310445|lt=Yoshitsune|1=Minamoto no Yoshitsune}} , who was en route to Kamakura, was detained at {{ill|Koshigoe|en|Koshigoe|WD=Q6433121|lt=Koshigoe|1=Koshigoe}} , and thus entrusted a letter (the {{ill|Letter from Koshigoe|en|Letter from Koshigoe|WD=Q11612346|lt=Koshigoe Letter|1=Letter from Koshigoe}} ) to {{ill|Ōe no Hiromoto|en|Ōe no Hiromoto|WD=Q384829|lt=Ōe Hiromoto|1=Ōe no Hiromoto}} . * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1576|en|1576|WD=Q6700|lt=1576 AD|1=1576}} {{ill|June 20|en|June 20|WD=Q2666|lt=June 20|1=June 20}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshiie|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} executed approximately 1,000 captives of the {{ill|Echizen Ikko-ikki|ja|越前一向一揆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echizen Ikko-ikki|1=Echizen ikki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636409}} , subjecting them to crucifixion and boiling. (Dating based on Ikko-ikki inscription tiles is approximate; some sources propose Tenshō 8 ({{ill|1580|en|1580|WD=Q6712|lt=1580 AD|1=1580}} {{ill|July 5|en|July 5|WD=Q2696|lt=July 5|1=July 5}} )). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1790|en|1790|WD=Q7775|lt=1790 AD|1=1790}} {{ill|July 6|en|July 6|WD=Q2695|lt=July 6|1=July 6}} ) – The Kansei Prohibition on Heterodox Learning was enacted, with {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|en|Matsudaira Sadanobu|WD=Q284038|lt=Matsudaira Sadanobu|1=Matsudaira Sadanobu}} banning the teaching of subjects other than {{ill|Cheng–Zhu school|en|Cheng–Zhu school|WD=Q841735|lt=Neo-Confucianism|1=Cheng–Zhu school}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|en|Yushima Seidō|WD=Q1760591|lt=Yushima Seidō|1=Yushima Seidō}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenryaku|en|Tenryaku|WD=Q1346281|lt=Tenryaku|1=Tenryaku}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|950|en|950|WD=Q23449|lt=950 AD|1=950}} {{ill|June 12|en|June 12|WD=Q2619|lt=June 12|1=June 12}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reizei|en|Emperor Reizei|WD=Q374125|lt=Emperor Reisō|1=Emperor Reizei}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor|1=Emperor of Japan}} (d. {{ill|1011|en|1011|WD=Q19238|lt=1011 AD|1=1011}} ). * {{ill|Gen'ei|en|Gen'ei|WD=Q1193613|lt=Gennin|1=Gen'ei}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1118|en|1118|WD=Q19539|lt=1118 AD|1=1118}} {{ill|June 14|en|June 14|WD=Q2612|lt=June 14|1=June 14}} ) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}} , a military commander and protector (shugo) of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|en|Shimōsa Province|WD=Q1053695|lt=Shimōsa|1=Shimōsa Province}} (d. {{ill|1201|en|1201|WD=Q5225|lt=1201 AD|1=1201}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|en|Shōhō|WD=Q1146192|lt=Shōhō|1=Shōhō}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1644|en|1644|WD=Q6920|lt=1644 AD|1=1644}} {{ill|June 28|en|June 28|WD=Q2660|lt=June 28|1=June 28}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|en|Tokugawa Tsunashige|WD=Q7004484|lt=Tokugawa Tsunashige|1=Tokugawa Tsunashige}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Kōfu Domain|en|Kōfu Domain|WD=Q661116|lt=Kōfu Domain|1=Kōfu Domain}} , the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|WD=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu|1=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} , and the father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|en|Tokugawa Ienobu|WD=Q366734|lt=Tokugawa Ienobu|1=Tokugawa Ienobu}} (d. {{ill|1678|en|1678|WD=Q7634|lt=1678 AD|1=1678}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|WD=Q1325317|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka}} 3rd Year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1846|en|1846|WD=Q7640|lt=1846 AD|1=1846}} {{ill|July 17|en|July 17|WD=Q2729|lt=July 17|1=July 17}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|en|Tokugawa Iemochi|WD=Q348466|lt=Tokugawa Iemoto|1=Tokugawa Iemochi}} , the 14th shogun of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. {{ill|1866|en|1866|WD=Q7712|lt=1866 AD|1=1866}} ). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871 AD|1=1871}} {{ill|July 11|en|July 11|WD=Q2701|lt=July 11|1=July 11}} ) – {{ill|Kida Sadakichi|ja|喜田貞吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kida Sadakichi|qq=}} , a historian (d. {{ill|1939|en|1939|WD=Q18639|lt=1939 AD|1=1939}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1636|en|1636|WD=Q6885|lt=1636 AD|1=1636}} {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27|1=June 27}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune|en|Date Masamune|WD=Q311183|lt=Date Masamune|1=Date Masamune}} , a military commander and the first lord of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|en|Sendai Domain|WD=Q1062182|lt=Sendai Domain|1=Sendai Domain}} (born {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567 AD|1=1567}} ).
== Commemorations == *
